g.text: GRPC is used where there is a requirement for
Static updates: such as user information updates in order
service from the authentication table. Not just in Order
service, it is applicable wherever the reference table is
Role validation: If an endpoint has Dynamic permissions,
then gRPC is used to validate that permission from auth.
Sending instant notifications: Instant notifications, such as
OTP based, must be synchronous and fast .
Kafka can be used for Asynchronous and reliable
Order service: The red arrow represents the steps after the
Product Updates: Product table is saved across different
services such as catalogue, Elastic Search, cart, inventory,
order, etc. Once any updates are made, it must be reflected
Redis is configured as a cache for better performance, which
Notification service: Redis persist SSE connections, so
requests are routed to the right service
